name: Failed DNS Zone Transfer
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Zach Mathis
SIGMA Title: Failed DNS Zone Transfer
SIGMA Description: Detects when a DNS zone transfer failed.

False positives:
- Unlikely

conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=6004 AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Failed DNS Zone Transfer on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=6004 AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Failed DNS Zone Transfer
